subcodes.first_line: O thou spiritual youth! Two letters have been received from thee, one dated April 3, 1919, and the other [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الفتی الرحمانی قد حضر منک تحریران احدهما مورخ به ۳ آپریل ۱۹۱۹ و الاخر
subcodes.subjects: @materialism; material vs. spiritual civilization, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @praise and encouragement, @light and darkness
